docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY BROWN, DARIUS AS TO DEFENDANT DOOR DASH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
